layers.name: patch_stone_cobble_path
layers.description: Transparent decorative patch on transparent background: organic irregular winding stone cobble path region, painted darker cool grey stones forming a natural path shape. Soft alpha edges tapering to transparent. Painterly hand-painted 2D top-down, designed to overlay on a flat floor as a different ground material zone. Organic blob shape, NO straight edges, NO rectangular boundary.
layers.negative_description: rectangular border, straight edges, tile grid, full rectangle fill, walls, character, square boundary, raised edge, 3D platform

layers.negative_description: rectangular border, straight edges, tile grid, full rectangle fill, walls, character, square boundary, raised edge, vibrant green, swamp green
